phrases.en: Dan got back to his building.
He checked his mailbox and took out his mail.
phrases.zh: 他查看了邮箱，把信件取了出来。

phrases.en: Then, he took an elevator up to his floor.
phrases.zh: 然后，他坐电梯上到了他那一层。

phrases.en: He walked down the hall to his apartment.
phrases.zh: 他沿着走廊走到自己的公寓。

phrases.en: He opened his door and went inside.
Pressing the "up" button
Waiting for the elevator
Getting on the elevator
Choosing a floor
Getting off the elevator
I got back to my house.
I walked up the steps to my front door.
I unlocked it with my house key.
phrases.zh: 我用家里的钥匙把门打开。

phrases.en: And then opened the door by turning the doorknob.
phrases.zh: 然后转动门把手把门打开。

phrases.en: I set my bag down.
I hung my coat up in the front closet.
phrases.zh: 我把外套挂在门口的衣柜里。

phrases.en: And took off my shoes.
I picked up my mail.
Then, I went into the living room.
And checked for messages on the answering machine.
phrases.zh: 并查看了答录机上的留言。

phrases.en: Then, I changed clothes.
I took off my work clothes.
phrases.zh: 我脱掉了工作时穿的衣服。

phrases.en: And changed into some casual clothes.
phrases.zh: 换上了一些休闲的衣服。
